senses.definition_dg: Wakati, chifaa cha kupimira wakati.

examples.dg: Ni saa ngaphi? Ni saa ne.
examples.en: What time is it? It is ten o'clock.

senses.definition_dg: Kurehera chitu chihendeke.

examples.en: Because of the rain, we didn't go.

senses.definition_dg: Nambari ya 70.

examples.en: That elder is seventy years old.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho chinatozwa kpwa Mlungu au kpwa atu. Mlavyo.

examples.dg: Safari ya kuphiya Mombasa ni ya siku mwenga.
examples.en: The journey to Mombasa takes one day.

examples.en: He is travelling to Dar es Salaam.

senses.definition_dg: Ugonjwa wa kupungukiwa ni milatso mwirini.

senses.definition_dg: Kutwanga nafaka au chitu chanjina hadi chikale unga.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika matako tsini, kukala.

magulu to sit with one's legs out straight in front
to sit on the ground cross-legged

senses.definition_dg: Kuishi phatu fulani kpwa muda.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala dzulu ya chitu, au kuku kufunikira mayai ili gavyalwe.

senses.definition_dg: Kubaki phatu bada ya atu anjina kutsama.

examples.dg: Afika salama bada ya safari ndefu.

examples.en: He is thirty years old.

examples.en: Grandfather is eighty years old.

senses.definition_dg: Kurichira mutu makosa gakpwe na kusiriphiza.

examples.en: Forgive me, I made a mistake.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kisarufi rinaelezera kuona vinono.

senses.definition_dg: Kugomba mambo mabii kuhusu mutu nyuma yakpwe.

examples.dg: Singa sahani hizi kpwa madzi ya moho.
examples.en: Wash these plates with hot water.
examples.sw: Osha sahani hizi kwa maji ya moto.

senses.definition_dg: Kumgombera mutu maneno ga handzo kumuhasiri.

examples.en: Don't slander an innocent person.

equivalents_en: kuyega to tilt one's head sideways

senses.definition_en: , kuyega to tilt one's head sideways
senses.definition_dg: Kuyega shingo uphande mmwenga.

examples.en: He tilted his head to the right side.

senses.definition_en: big plate, usually made of tin or alminium
senses.definition_dg: Sahani kulu ya bati au aluminiamu.

examples.en: Put the food on the big plate.

senses.definition_en: we, us (used alone, often for emphasis)
senses.definition_dg: Swiswi, swino. Neno ra kuhikishira — sisi.

examples.en: We are not liars.

senses.definition_dg: Kumtsukiza mutu na kumuhendesa akale na hasira.

examples.en: Don't annoy someone on purpose.

senses.definition_en: they are not, we are not, it is not (referring to nouns of class 3 or 14)
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukahala — si hivyo, si kpweli.

examples.en: It's not me — it's someone else.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo atu gonjwa anaphozwa. Hospitali.

examples.en: The sick person was taken to hospital.

senses.definition_dg: Kumala, kuisha.

examples.en: The food is finished; nothing is left.

equivalents_en: rub or crush herbs on a stone to make medicine

senses.definition_en: to rub or crush herbs on a stone to make medicine
senses.definition_dg: Kusuga mihi ya dawa dzulu ya dziwe ili itoe dawa.

examples.dg: Wasira dawa ya mihi kpwa siro.
examples.en: She crushed medicinal herbs on the stone.
examples.sw: Alisaga dawa ya miti kwenye jiwe.

senses.definition_dg: Neno au jambo risirondwa rimanywe ni atu anji.

examples.dg: Usieneze siri za mutu; ni dhambi.
examples.en: Don't spread a person's secrets; it is a sin.
examples.sw: Usieneze siri za mtu; ni dhambi.

senses.definition_dg: Kusugua chitu kpwa nguvu.

examples.en: Scrub the plate until it is clean.

equivalents_en: cover with earth (e.g. fill in a ditch)

senses.definition_en: to cover with earth (e.g. fill in a ditch)
senses.definition_dg: Kufukia chitu na udongo, dza shimo au mfereji.

examples.en: He filled in the hole that was dug there.

equivalents_sw: kufukia mfuko baada ya maiti kuondolewa

senses.definition_sw: kufukia mfuko baada ya maiti kuondolewa
senses.definition_dg: Kufukia kaburi bada ya maiti kuuswa.

examples.dg: Sirisiri ni jambo ra kare kpwa Adigo.
examples.en: The re-burial ceremony is an old Digo custom.
examples.sw: Sirisiri ni desturi ya zamani ya Wadigo.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kukala laini, usio na mikwaruzo.

examples.en: Her skin is smooth.

equivalents_en: stone on which herbs are rubbed to produce medicine

senses.definition_en: stone on which herbs are rubbed to produce medicine
senses.definition_dg: Dziwe ambapo dawa za mihi zinasugwa.

examples.en: The healer grinds medicine on the stone.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariye na hasira, wa kutisha.

examples.en: In the war the enemies were fierce

senses.definition_en: to put an end to, to kill something or someone
senses.definition_dg: Kukomesa chitu au kumaliza mutu.

examples.en: He killed the snake with a stick.

senses.definition_en: ngoro to breathe out heavily, to exhale
senses.definition_dg: Kutoa hewa kula mapafuni kpwa nguvu. Kupumua kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Wasisa ngoro kulu bada ya kuzola.
examples.en: He breathed out heavily after running.
examples.sw: Alipumua kwa nguvu baada ya kukimbia.

senses.definition_en: we, us (used alone, often for emphasis)
senses.definition_dg: Swiswi. Neno ra atu airi au zaidi pamwenga nawe.

examples.en: All of us are one people.

sub_entries.definition_en: us and you (i.e. for you as well as us)
sub_entries.definition_sw: you should go to the shop and buy some

senses.definition_dg: Kuenderera kugomba neno bila kuricha.

examples.en: He insisted that he would go.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukahala kpwa nguvu — swiswi si.

examples.dg: Sisi atu a Golini siswi atu a pwani
examples.en: We people from Golini we are not people of the coast
examples.sw: Sisi watu wa Golini si watu wa pwani.

senses.definition_dg: Kuima na kukosa kuenderera. Kusimama.

examples.en: The blood has stopped
The rain has stopped

senses.definition_dg: Maneno au kazi kukala si sawa-sawa, kukosa utaratibu.

examples.en: His speech is disjointed; he doesn't understand properly.

senses.definition_dg: Kuosha sehemu za siri.

examples.en: It is important to wash one's private parts every day.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuishi kpwa anasa na raha.

examples.en: He lives a life of luxury.

senses.definition_en: to cover up, to hide something
senses.definition_dg: Kufunika chitu kibaya au kukificha ili kisionekane.

examples.en: Cover up for your friend, and God will cover for you.

senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukahala kpwa nguvu — uwe si.

examples.dg: Ichikala uwe kandakutiya adabu, phahi umanye siwe mwanawe kabisa
examples.en: If he does not discipline you, then you can be sure that you are not his child
examples.sw: Ikiwa hataadhibu, basi ujue wewe si mtoto wake kabisa.

equivalents_en: sieve flour or winnow grains to remove dirt

senses.definition_en: to sieve flour or winnow grains to remove dirt
senses.definition_dg: Kupephetera unga au nafaka ili kuusa uchafu.

examples.dg: Mama anasiya unga kpwa kutoa uchafu.
examples.en: Mother is sieving the flour to remove dirt.

equivalents_en: prepare a field to plant rice

senses.definition_en: to prepare a field to plant rice
senses.definition_dg: Kutengeneza munda kpwa kupanda mpunga.

examples.dg: Baba anasiya munda kpwa kutayarisha kupanda mpunga.
examples.en: Father is preparing the field for planting rice.
examples.sw: Baba anatayarisha shamba kwa kupanda mpunga.

equivalents_en: he or she is or was not

senses.definition_en: he or she is or was not
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukahala — yeye si.

examples.en: We told him to stop because he isn't one of us
examples.sw: Hatumsumbui kwa sababu yeye si ndugu yetu.

equivalents_sw: see also sio; sio; angalia pia sio

senses.definition_en: it is not (generally, and referring to nouns of class 9)
senses.definition_sw: see also sio; sio; angalia pia sio
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kukahala — si hivyo.

examples.en: That is not what I said.

senses.definition_en: drummer, one who is an expert in playing drums
senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariye mtaalamu wa kupiga ngoma.

examples.en: The expert drummer plays the drums very well.

senses.definition_dg: Kutoya hewa ndani na kuitoa mwirini. Kupumua.

examples.en: Breathe slowly and rest.

senses.definition_dg: Angaliya sukuli.

examples.dg: Soko ni neno ranjina ra sukuli.
examples.en: Soko is another word for sukuli (school).
examples.sw: Soko ni neno lingine la sukuli (shule).

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo atu anaguza na kugura vitu.

examples.en: Mother is going to the market to buy vegetables.

senses.definition_en: to protrude, to bulge, to be ready to be removed
senses.definition_dg: Kutumbuka au kuika kondze.

examples.en: He has bulging eyes

senses.definition_en: to scrape out, especially coconut flesh
senses.definition_dg: Kukuna sehemu ya ndani ya nazi au chitu chanjina.

examples.en: She scraped out the coconut flesh well.

senses.definition_en: marble made from clay, used for killing birds, bird-lime
senses.definition_dg: Chitu cha udongo kidiringishwa dza mpira cha kupigira nyuni.

examples.en: The child shoots a marble with a catapult.

senses.definition_en: to twine, to wind a rope or string
senses.definition_dg: Kusokota kamba au uzi kpwa kuuzungusha.

examples.en: He is twining a sisal rope.

senses.definition_en: to read, to study, to learn
senses.definition_dg: Kuangaliya maneno ga chitabu na kugaelewa. Piya ni kuphiya skuli.

examples.en: The child is reading a book.

senses.definition_dg: Kufundza mutu kusoma na kuandika au mambo ganjina.

examples.en: The teacher is teaching the children in the classroom.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu chinahojifundzwa au kufundzishwa.

examples.dg: Somo ra rero ni ra hesabu.
examples.en: Today's lesson is mathematics.
examples.sw: Somo la leo ni la hesabu.

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ariye na dzina sawa na rako.

examples.dg: Bakari ni somu wangu; huna dzina mwenga.
examples.en: Bakari is my namesake; we have the same name.
examples.sw: Bakari ni somo wangu; tuna jina moja.

senses.definition_dg: Kufuma nyere kpwa kuzisuka.

examples.en: The woman is plaiting her hair.

senses.definition_en: to strangle, to break a neck
senses.definition_dg: Kugbwira mutu shingoni hadi asiweze kupumua. Kunyonga.

examples.en: The thief strangled the person who saw him.

senses.definition_dg: Kukala kupindika, kukala si kunyooha.

examples.en: This tree is crooked

senses.definition_dg: Kupinda chitu kpwa kukichongeza.

examples.dg: Wasongolosa chuma na kukihenda kama pete.
examples.en: He twisted the metal and made it like a ring.
examples.sw: Alisongonyoa chuma na kukifanya kama pete.

senses.definition_en: to hiss when cooking, like ugali
senses.definition_dg: Kutoa sauti ya kusononeka wakati wa kupika, dza ugali.

examples.dg: Ugali unasonona kpwa chimbuzi; u tayari.
examples.en: The ugali is hissing in the pot; it is ready.
examples.sw: Ugali unasononeka kwenye chungu; uko tayari.

senses.definition_en: to be sorry for, to feel hurt
senses.definition_dg: Kukala na huzuni ya ndani kpwa sababu ya mambo mabii.

examples.dg: Ninasononeka kpwa mambo gariyomphaha msena wangu.
examples.en: I feel sorry for what happened to my friend.
examples.sw: Ninasononeka kwa mambo yaliyompata rafiki yangu.

senses.definition_dg: Huzuni kulu ya moyoni.

examples.dg: Sonono ra kupoteza mwanawe ni kulu sana.
examples.en: The sorrow of losing her child is very great.
examples.sw: Huzuni ya kupoteza mtoto wake ni kubwa sana.

senses.definition_dg: Baba wa mutu unayegomba naye.

examples.en: Where is your father? He went to work.
examples.sw: Baba yako yuko wapi? Amekwenda kazini.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu ya laini inayoriywa ya nazi changa.

examples.dg: Sowi ya dafu ni nono sana kuriywa.
examples.en: The flesh of a young coconut is very good to eat.
examples.sw: Sehemu ya ndani ya dafu ni nzuri kula.

senses.definition_dg: Kufaa kupokera chitu, kukala na haki ya kupewa.

examples.dg: Anastahili kupewa zawadi kpwa kazi yakpwe nono.
examples.en: He deserves to be given a reward for his good work.
examples.sw: Anastahili kupewa zawadi kwa kazi yake nzuri.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo matatu au magari ganasimama kupakia na kuteremsha atu.

examples.en: I will be at the bus stop waiting for you.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda mutu akale na furaha na raha.

examples.en: His songs give pleasure to people.

equivalents_en: a dangerous spirit which although 'Arabic' is also pagan
equivalents_sw: pepo wa hatari ambaye ni ya kiarabu lakini siyo ya kiislamu

senses.definition_en: a dangerous spirit which although 'Arabic' is also pagan
senses.definition_sw: pepo wa hatari ambaye ni ya kiarabu lakini siyo ya kiislamu
senses.definition_dg: Pepo wa hatari ambayo ni ya Kiarabu ela si ya Chiislamu.

examples.dg: Subiani ni pepo wa hatari; mutu ariyemgbwirwa anahitaji kayamba.
examples.en: Subiani is a dangerous spirit; a person affected needs a kayamba ceremony.
examples.sw: Subiani ni pepo wa hatari; mtu aliyeshikwa anahitaji kayamba.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya kuvumiliya na kungodzera bila hasira.

examples.en: Eurpoeans don't have much patience

equivalents_en: ear of cereal such as rice or wheat

senses.definition_en: ear of cereal such as rice or wheat
senses.definition_dg: Chitswa cha nafaka dza mpunga au ngano.

examples.en: The rice ears have ripened well.

equivalents_en: of alternative letter combinations to look for when using the dictionary: When looking for ia or ie      try   iya or iye for oa or ua      try   owa or uwa for ue

senses.definition_en: of alternative letter combinations to look for when using the dictionary: When looking for ia or ie      try   iya or iye for oa or ua      try   owa or uwa for ue, uo, or ui try   uwe, uwo, or uwi for nz            try   ndz for mg or mk try        mgbw or mkpw for bw or gw      try   gbw for kw or p       try   kpw for v or m        try   ph Mlongozo wa harufu 1.       Alama za Chidigo Alama hizi zilungazo zinahumirwa karibu sawa na za Chiswahili: a, b, ch, e, f, g, i, j
senses.definition_dg: Maelezo ya namna ya kutafuta maneno kpwa Chidigo kpwa kutumiya herufi tafauti.

examples.dg: Ukironda neno kpwa Chidigo, jaribu herufi tafauti.
examples.en: When looking for a Digo word, try different letter combinations.
examples.sw: Unapotafuta neno la Kidigo, jaribu herufi tofauti.

senses.definition_dg: Kusugua chitu kpwa nguvu na makini.

examples.en: Scrub the plate with a sponge.

senses.definition_dg: Kutikisa chitu kpwa nguvu.

examples.en: The wind is very strong (it shakes things)

sub_entries.definition_en: to disagree, to shake one's head

senses.definition_dg: Kufuma chitu dza mkeka au kaphu.

examples.en: Mother is weaving a mat from palm leaves.

senses.definition_dg: Hali ya fujo na kutokukala na amani.

examples.dg: Kuna suko-suko mudzini kpwa sababu ya siasa.
examples.en: There is upheaval in the town because of politics.
examples.sw: Kuna sukosuko mjini kwa sababu ya siasa.

senses.definition_dg: Siku ya sherehe ya tsi au ya dini.

examples.dg: Sukukuu ya Iddi ni siku ya furaha.
examples.en: The Eid holiday is a day of joy.
examples.sw: Sikukuu ya Idi ni siku ya furaha.

senses.definition_dg: Phatu ambapo anache anaphiya kusoma. Shule.

examples.en: The child goes to school every day.

senses.definition_dg: Kuika nguvu na kugeneza chitu mbere.

examples.en: Push the car so it goes forward.

senses.definition_dg: Njia ya kumaliza tatizo au malumbano kpwa amani.

examples.en: The solution to this problem was found.

equivalents_en: needle made either from metal or wood used for sewing together a

senses.definition_en: needle made either from metal or wood used for sewing together a
senses.definition_dg: Sindano ya chuma au ya muhi ya kushonera makuti au nyasi.

examples.dg: Wahala sumba kushona makuti ga nyumba.
examples.en: He took a needle to sew palm leaves for the house.
examples.sw: Alichukua sindano ya kushona makuti ya nyumba.

senses.definition_en: to tremble, to shake lightly, to wave (trees and leaves)
senses.definition_dg: Kutikisika kidogo, kutetema kpwa nguvu.

examples.dg: Makodza ga muhi ganasumba kpwa phepho.
examples.en: The leaves of the tree are trembling in the wind.
examples.sw: Majani ya mti yanatikisika kwa upepo.

senses.definition_dg: Kuhenda chitu chitikisike au kibembe.

examples.dg: Wapharika muvwio sawa-sawa, bila ya kusumbiza uha
examples.en: He attached hi arrow firmly, without wobbling his bow
examples.sw: Aliweka mshale sawasawa, bila kubembeza uta.

senses.definition_dg: Chitu ambacho chikimizwa au kutiywa mwirini chinaolaga au kuumiza.

examples.dg: Nyoka uhu ana sumu kali sana.
examples.en: This snake has very strong poison.
examples.sw: Nyoka huyu ana sumu kali sana.

examples.en: A poisonous mushroom

senses.definition_dg: Mutu ambaye kagombwa na atu, wa kukala kando.

examples.dg: Mutu wa sununu kagombwa ni atu anji.
examples.en: A stand-offish person is not liked by many people.
examples.sw: Mtu wa sununu hapendwi na watu wengi.

senses.definition_dg: Uso wa mutu au muonekano wa chitu.

examples.dg: Sura ya mutu iye ni ya upole.
examples.en: That person's face is gentle.
examples.sw: Sura ya mtu yule ni ya upole.

senses.definition_dg: Sehemu mwenga ya chitabu au Qurani.

examples.dg: Soma sura ya kpwandza ya chitabu.
examples.en: Read the first chapter of the book.
examples.sw: Soma sura ya kwanza ya kitabu.

senses.definition_dg: Nguwo ya migulu ambayo inavwalwa ni alume na achetu.

examples.en: He wore long trousers.

senses.definition_dg: Kukpwedza phatu fulani mara nyinji.

examples.dg: Mutu iye anasusurika nyumbani kpwehu sana.
examples.en: That person comes to our house very frequently.
examples.sw: Mtu yule anakuja nyumbani kwetu mara nyingi.

senses.definition_en: to wash e.g. dishes, furniture, floors
senses.definition_dg: Kuosha vitu dza sahani, samani, au sakafu.

examples.en: Wash the dishes after eating.

equivalents_en: dirt that is removed by sieving
equivalents_sw: uchafu unaobaki baada ya kuchunga au kupepeta

senses.definition_en: dirt that is removed by sieving, chaff
senses.definition_sw: uchafu unaobaki baada ya kuchunga au kupepeta
senses.definition_dg: Uchafu unaotsala bada ya kupephetera au kuchuja nafaka.

examples.en: Throw away the chaff after winnowing.

senses.definition_dg: Kuosha chitu kpwa madzi masafi bada ya kuchisuwa.

examples.en: Rinse the plates with clean water.

senses.definition_dg: Neno au sentensi inayouza chitu.

examples.en: Your question is good; I will answer it.

senses.definition_dg: Madzi kuisha phatu fulani, dza muho kuuma.

examples.en: The river dried up because of the hot sun.

equivalents_en: short form of swiswi (‘we’) used in conjunction with e.g. enye (ourselves)

senses.definition_en: short form of swiswi (‘we’) used in conjunction with e.g. enye (ourselves)
senses.definition_dg: Neno ra kufupisha 'swiswi' — sisi.

examples.dg: Hukamsikirani swi enye anagomba na kauliye
examples.en: We ourselves have heard what he says from his own mouth
examples.sw: Tusikize sisi wenyewe anachosema kwa sauti yake.

senses.definition_en: we, us (used alone, often for emphasis)
senses.definition_dg: Sisi, swino. Neno ra kuhikishira.

examples.dg: Swiswi hukala atu a mudzi uhu.
examples.en: We are people of this village.
examples.sw: Sisi ni watu wa kijiji hiki.
